What I Offer

Travel designed for you

01
🗺

Custom Itinerary Design

A fully bespoke day-by-day plan built around your pace, passions, and budget. Hotel curation, restaurant reservations, private guides, transfers — all handled.

From $250 per trip week
02
🏛

Villa & Hotel Bookings

Access to boutique hotels, private villas, and Virtuoso-preferred properties across the Mediterranean — with exclusive perks, upgrades, and amenities.

Commission-based
03
⛏

Unique Adventure Experiences

Yacht charters, coastal hiking, cycling through Tuscany, diving in Sardinia — one-of-a-kind experiences crafted for the curious and adventurous.

Custom pricing
04
🍳

Curated Local Experiences

Cooking classes in a Florentine kitchen, private wine tastings in Barolo, truffle hunting in Umbria, ceramics workshops in Positano — bookings that go beyond sightseeing.

Custom pricing
05
🏷

On-Trip Support & Concierge

Seamless assistance from departure to return — real-time itinerary adjustments, restaurant reservations, last-minute changes, and a direct line to me whenever you need it.

Included with all trips

Travel Styles

Find your kind of journey

Every traveler is different. Whether you crave adventure, luxury, or simply time to slow down — I design trips around how you want to feel.

❤

Honeymoon

Private villas, candlelit dinners, sunset boat charters, and once-in-a-lifetime moments crafted for two. Romance is in every detail.

Plan your honeymoon →
🏛

Luxury

Virtuoso-preferred hotels, private transfers, exclusive access, and seamless service from arrival to departure. Only the best.

Explore luxury travel →
⛷

Adventure

Coastal hikes, yacht charters, cycling through vineyards, and diving hidden coves — for those who want their beauty served with adrenaline.

Plan an adventure →
🧚

Wellness

Thermal retreats, clifftop yoga, hammam rituals, and silent escapes in places where the pace of life forces you to breathe again.

Explore wellness trips →
🍳

Food & Wine

Truffle hunts, cooking classes, private vineyard tastings, and market mornings that turn a trip into a full sensory education.

Plan a food journey →
🏭

Culture & History

Private museum access, guided archaeological walks, artisan workshops, and evenings in places that feel untouched by time.

Explore culture trips →
🕐

Slow Travel

Farmhouse weeks, village markets, long lunches with nowhere to be. Travel that asks nothing of you except to be present.

Plan a slow escape →
Ischia, Italy
Hey There!

I'm Izabella

Your Boutique Travel Consultant

I'm Izabella — a Denver-based travel consultant, dual US-Italian citizen, and the person who will obsessively research every detail of your trip so you don't have to. (Yes, I'm that friend.)

If you want a village, you have to be a villager — and nobody knows the Mediterranean like someone who's lived it. I'm here to make your dream trip happen, beautifully and without the chaos.

Learn More
